title: Add prompt-flow and init default regression tests
description: Add or update tests covering `_select_from_list()` behavior, menu-driven runner/stack selection, `Other` fallback behavior, canonical language handling, and non-interactive defaults sourced from the shared stack catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover `_select_from_list()` default selection, valid selection, invalid-then-valid retry, and out-of-range retry.
Tests cover interactive TypeScript selection pre-filling `npm test` and `tsc --noEmit`.
Tests cover `Other` falling back to free-text language/test/build prompts.
Tests cover runner menu invalid-entry retry behavior.
Tests cover non-interactive init sourcing Python defaults from `STACKS[0]`.

handoff_summary.completed: All acceptance criteria verified as met: (1) `_select_from_list()` coverage in `test_onboarding_prompts.py::TestSelectFromList`; (2) Interactive TypeScript selection pre-filling in `test_onboarding_scaffold.py::TestCollectInitAnswers::test_custom_values`; (3) Other fallback in `test_other_stack_free_text`; (4) Runner retry in `test_invalid_runner_then_valid`; (5) Non-interactive STACKS[0] defaults in `test_cli_init.py::test_non_interactive_uses_default_answers` and `test_non_interactive_build_check_command_from_stack_catalog`; (6) `_language_specific_known_issues()` for Node.js, TypeScript, and Other in `TestLanguageSpecificKnownIssues` class.
handoff_summary.remaining: Nothing. All criteria met by existing commits from dependency bead tester agents.
handoff_summary.risks: None. All test files compile cleanly (syntax-checked). No source code changes made.
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed to tester bead (B-76374957-test) to run the full test suite and confirm no regressions.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: None. No source files modified; only verified existing test coverage.
handoff_summary.design_decisions: No new tests were written. The dependency bead tester agents (B-7e28a7b0-test, B-8d48e734, B-3722ddd9-test) already implemented the full regression test suite covering all 6 acceptance criteria. The tests are spread across three dedicated files following the project's established test organization pattern (one file per module concern) rather than consolidating into a single `test_orchestrator.py`.
handoff_summary.test_coverage_notes: Tester should verify all tests in test_onboarding_prompts.py, test_onboarding_scaffold.py::TestSelectFromList/TestCollectInitAnswers/TestSeedMemoryFiles/TestLanguageSpecificKnownIssues, and test_cli_init.py::TestCommandInit pass without regressions. The `TestLanguageSpecificKnownIssues` class in particular exercises the canonical exact-match semantics of `_language_specific_known_issues()` — verifying that Node.js, TypeScript, and Other all behave correctly, and that free-text variants like "TypeScript/Node.js" or "golang" correctly return "".
handoff_summary.known_limitations: The expected_globs in the bead spec referenced `tests/test_orchestrator.py` which does not exist in the current codebase. Tests are correctly distributed across dedicated files matching the project's test organization conventions.

conflict_risks: None. No source files modified; only verified existing test coverage.

execution_history.summary: All 6 acceptance criteria are fully satisfied by tests already committed by the dependency beads' tester agents (B-7e28a7b0-test, B-8d48e734, B-3722ddd9-test). No new test code was needed.
